content: We couldn’t find a contact matching the Stripe email. Billing and services will continue to work, but we recommend contacting the {{productName}} owner to assign a new Payer.

comment.text: This text explains to administrators that a Stripe email contact couldn't be found for the payer, and while billing will continue, they should contact the product owner to assign a new one. It appears within the Portal Settings > Payments section to inform the user about an issue with the payer's contact information. Translators should ensure clarity regarding the recommended action of contacting the product owner.
